members.name: JavaScript Environment
members.description: Scriptable uses Apple's JavaScriptCore, which supports ECMAScript 6.

members.name: Learning JavaScript
members.description: If you're just getting started with JavaScript, you may want to take a look at Codecademy's Intro to Programming in JavaScript. For a quick reference to JavaScripts features, you may refer to W3Schools' JavaScript Tutorial.

members.name: Community
members.description: The forum is a great place to get help, share your scripts and get inspiration for new scripts. The forum is located at talk.automators.fm. Thanks to Automators for hosting the forum!

members.name: title
members.description: Title displayed in the alert. Usually a short string.

members.name: message
members.description: Detailed message displayed in the alert.

members.name: -addAction
members.description: Adds an action to the alert.

members.name: -addDestructiveAction
members.description: Adds a destructive action to the alert.

members.name: -addCancelAction
members.description: Adds a cancel action to the alert.

members.name: -addTextField
members.description: Adds a text field prompting for user input.

members.name: -addSecureTextField
members.description: Adds a secure text field prompting for user input.

members.name: -textFieldValue
members.description: Retrieves value of a text field.

members.name: -presentSheet
members.description: Presents the alert as a sheet.

members.name: length
members.description: Number of arguments supplied by a share sheet.

members.name: all
members.description: All arguments supplied by a share sheet.

members.name: plainTexts
members.description: Plain texts supplied by a share sheet or a shortcut action.

members.name: urls
members.description: URLs supplied by a share sheet or a shortcut action.

members.name: fileURLs
members.description: File URLs supplied by a share sheet or a shortcut action.

members.name: images
members.description: Images supplied by a share sheet or a shortcut action.

members.name: queryParameters
members.description: Query parameters from a URL scheme.

members.name: siriShortcutArguments
members.description: Arguments passed from a Siri Shortcut.

members.name: notification
members.description: Notification being handled by the script.

members.name: isSubscribed
members.description: Whether the calendar is a subscribed calendar.

members.name: allowsContentModifications
members.description: Indicates whether items can be added, edited, and deleted in the calendar.

members.name: -supportsAvailability
members.description: Checks if the calendar supports availability.

members.name: +forRemindersByTitle
members.description: Fetches a calendar that holds reminders.

members.name: +forEventsByTitle
members.description: Fetches a calendar that holds events.

members.name: +createForReminders
members.description: Create a new calendar that holds reminders.

members.name: +findOrCreateForReminders
members.description: Find or create a new calendar that holds reminders.

members.name: +presentPicker
members.description: Presents a view for picking calendars.

members.name: isAllDay
members.description: Whether the event is an all-day event.

members.name: calendar
members.description: Calendar the event is stored in.

members.name: -presentEdit
members.description: Presents a view for editing the calendar event.

members.name: +presentCreate
members.description: Presents a view for creating a calendar event.

members.signature: static between(startDate: Date, endDate: Date, calendars: [Calendar]): Promise<[CalendarEvent]>
members.description: Events that occurs between two dates.

members.description: Whether the device is a phone.

members.description: Whether the device is a pad.

members.name: +screenBrightness
members.description: Brightness of the screen in percentage.

members.name: +isInPortrait
members.description: Whether the device is in portrait with the home button or home indicator at the bottom.

members.name: +isInPortraitUpsideDown
members.description: Whether the device is in portrait but upside down with the home button or home indicator at the top.

members.name: +isInLandscapeLeft
members.description: Whether the device is in landscape with the home button or home indicator on the right side.

members.name: +isInLandscapeRight
members.description: Whether the device is in landscape with the home button or home indicator on the left side.

members.name: +isFaceUp
members.description: Whether the device is lying parallel to the ground with the screen facing upwards.

members.name: +isFaceDown
members.description: Whether the device is lying parallel to the ground with the screen facing downwards.

members.name: +isDischarging
members.description: Whether the device is being not plugged into power and thus discharging.

members.description: Whether the device is being charged.

members.name: +isFullyCharged
members.description: Whether the device is fully charged.

members.name: +isUsingDarkAppearance
members.description: Whether the device is using dark appearance.

members.name: +setScreenBrightness
members.description: Sets the brightness of the screen.
